topic: A person unboxing the latest iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table, front view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Front view, hands hover over a Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro box on a wooden table.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Close-up, fingers lift the lid to reveal the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro inside the box.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Top-down, the opened box shows the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro nestled in its packaging on the wooden surface.
parsed_generation.narration: A concise, cinematic unboxing sequence on a wooden table. The hands move from approaching the closed box, to lifting the lid, and finally viewing the opened package from above, revealing the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro inside.

feedback:
The generated sequence largely centers on the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro on a wooden table, but its shot count and timing diverge from the gold standard (fewer shots, uneven [00:02-00:05] and [00:05-00:08] segments). It lacks the explicit top-down sealed-box setup, the side-angle reveal of the phone’s profile and camera bump, and the macro peel shot. To improve, adopt the 4-shot structure with uniform 2-second segments, include a macro peel shot and visible accessories, and add precise SFX cues for a cinema-quality unboxing sequence.
Failed checks: example_alignment
strengths: Clear focus on Desert Titanium finish and wooden table setting
Front-view framing initiates the unboxing premise
fixes: Increase shot count to mirror the gold standard (e.g., top-down sealed box, lid removal close-up, side-angle reveal of phone and accessories, macro peel).
Incorporate additional visual details (camera bump, USB-C cable, documentation) and a macro shot of the screen protection peel.
Add SFX cues (cardboard slide, paper rustle, film peel) to heighten the unboxing experience.
